title: cyclophyllum protractum
intro: Cyclophyllum protractum, a plant species native to Madagascar, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is commonly known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, due to its flavonoids and alkaloids content. Cyclophyllum protractum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and is also used in some traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
